name: access0x1-contracts
description: Non-custodial on-chain payments, commerce (subscriptions, bookings, invoices, gift cards), and identity via ERC-6909 receipts and ERC-7702 sessions. Solidity dependency manifest: Foundry resolves @chainlink/contracts into node_modules via a remapping (the canonical source now that chainlink-brownie-contracts is deprecated). Run `npm install` before `forge build`.
